summary: Frontend-only Veeva-style rewire tested end-to-end. Landing page, workspace shell, all left-nav views, agent action with Run Analysis, submission inspector (single-click) and detail view (double-click), inspector tabs and close, plus URL-hash deep linking all work. Zero console errors observed.

issues: Solutions section heading reads 'India's regulatory affairs teams.' — no literal 'Solutions' label. Section still exists on dark navy background with 3 audience cards (Pharma sponsors / CROs / RA consultancies) and matches spec visually, but renaming the section to include the word 'Solutions' (e.g. eyebrow label SOLUTIONS) would align with the PRD wording.

action_items: (Optional) Add a SOLUTIONS eyebrow label above 'India's regulatory affairs teams.' section on landing page to match PRD wording.
critical_code_review_comments: workspaceStore hash sync only writes 'sub' segment when activeView==='submission-detail'; selectedDocumentId is never serialised to the hash even though parser reads /doc/<id>. Minor inconsistency, not blocking.

WorkspaceRouter renders children below WorkspaceRouter in layout (main always renders both <WorkspaceRouter/> and {children}); since /app/page.tsx likely renders nothing relevant, but if a child page is added later it will stack under the router output. Consider removing {children} or gating it.
AGENT_IDS list is duplicated in WorkspaceRouter and LeftNav — extract to a shared constant in mockData.ts or a constants file (DRY).
test_credentials: n/a — app is mock-data, no auth required
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL: https://44def609-f92e-415e-a4dd-7705aa03c3ac.preview.emergentagent.com. Landing at /, workspace at /app. Hash routes like #/audit, #/correspondence, #/m1-anonymiser all work. data-testids verified: rc-shell, view-home, view-submissions/applications/registrations/documents/correspondence/audit/reports/settings/submission-detail, leftnav-{home,submissions,applications,registrations,documents,correspondence,audit,reports,settings,m1-anonymiser..m9-crossdoc}, subrow-{id}, right-inspector, inspector-tab-{details,actions,activity}, inspector-close, agent-run-btn. Single-click submission row opens right inspector; double-click opens submission-detail view. Run Analysis on any agent returns mocked findings after ~1.1s setTimeout.
test_coverage_executed: Landing page sections (Platform, Workflow, Security, Frameworks, dark navy Solutions analogue, Contact CTA, footer) — 6 platform headings + 3 audience cards present
Workspace shell renders with TopBar + LeftNav + Home view by default
Home view: KPI tiles + 'My Queue · Needs Action' (4 rows) + Vault-wide Compliance + Recent Activity verified visually
Left-nav navigation: 8/8 PASS (submissions, applications, registrations, documents, correspondence, audit, reports, settings)
Agent: leftnav-m7-scheduley → agent-run-btn → Run Analysis returns findings text
Submissions: 6 subrows present, single-click opens right-inspector with 3 tabs, close works
No JS console errors or pageerrors during full flow
